User.title: User Profile
User.description: Public profile details of a registered user

id.description: The unique user identifier matching their Auth UID

photoURL.description: The URL of the user's profile image

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the profile was created

Chama.title: Chama Group
Chama.description: Represents an informal cooperative savings and investment group (Chama)

description.description: A brief description of the Chama's focus and rules

totalSavings.description: The running total of savings in the Chama

totalLoans.description: The total outstanding loans given to members

contributionAmount.description: The standard contribution amount expected per period

currency.description: The currency used by this Chama (e.g., KES, USD)

createdBy.description: The user UID who created this Chama

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the Chama was created

Member.title: Chama Member
Member.description: A user's membership and role in a specific Chama

id.description: The membership ID (usually matching the user's Auth UID)

role.description: The member's office or role in the Chama

Contribution.title: Member Contribution
Contribution.description: A contribution made by a member towards savings, projects, or investments

memberName.description: The display name of the contributor

date.description: Date when the contribution was made

approvedBy.description: The UID of the treasurer/admin who approved this

Investment.title: Chama Investment
Investment.description: An asset, land, project, or financial vehicle owned by the Chama

title.description: The name or title of the investment project

amountInvested.description: The total cash invested from Chama funds

currentValue.description: The estimated current market value of the asset

status.description: The operational state of the asset

dateAcquired.description: The date when the investment was initiated

createdBy.description: The user UID who registered the investment

Loan.title: Chama Member Loan
Loan.description: A loan advanced to a member from the collective savings pool

repaymentTermMonths.description: The duration of repayment in months

amountRepaid.description: The total amount repaid so far

status.description: The current lifecycle state of the loan

dateRequested.description: Timestamp when the loan was requested

approvedBy.description: The UID of the treasurer/chairperson who approved it

ChamaNotification.title: Chama Notification
ChamaNotification.description: System or admin-generated notification broadcast or targeted to a specific user

message.description: Detailed text body of the notification

type.description: Visual type / priority of the notification

userId.description: Optional user UID. If empty, the notification is broadcast to all members

readBy.description: Array of user UIDs who have read/dismissed this notification

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the notification was created

link.description: The tab ID to redirect the user to when clicked

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profiles keyed by their Firebase Auth UID

/chamas/{chamaId}.description: Stores details of the Chama groups

/chamas/{chamaId}/members/{memberId}.description: Sub-collection tracking membership within a Chama

/chamas/{chamaId}/contributions/{contrib.description: Sub-collection tracking member contributions inside a Chama

/chamas/{chamaId}/notifications/{notific.description: Sub-collection tracking notifications inside a Chama
